title: Alchemy Deckbuilder
idea: Alchemy deckbuilding roguelite

title: Logistics Flow
idea: Delivery and logistics flow optimization deckbuilder

title: Magic Academy: Spell Synthesis
idea: Magic Academy card synthesis battle (same-type spells merge into amplified effects)

title: Circuit Breaker
idea: Hacking deckbuilder: stack same-type code cards; when stack reaches burden threshold, it COLLAPSES for amplified burst effect.

title: Calamity Dice
idea: Dice battler: roll elemental dice, pick one element per turn. Channeled dice enter log and return next turn, building an avalanche of power. Manage heat to avoid feedback damage.

title: Power Grid
idea: Power plant deckbuilder: manage 3 generators, play cards to boost output and control heat. Trigger chain overloads for massive score multipliers.

title: OVERLOAD
idea: Power core survival auto-shooter: manage charge meter for fire rate boost, trigger screen-clearing OVERLOAD at HP cost. Chain reactions cascade through enemies.

title: Fork Bomb
idea: Dice-splitting circuit battler: route signal dice through 3 lanes, split values across paths, and recombine matching adjacent values for multiplied burst damage.

title: Viral Cascade
idea: Hacking-themed cellular automaton grid battler: inject viruses, watch them spread, harvest connected clusters for chain damage. Overflow risk if clusters grow too large.

title: Synth Surge
idea: Auto-shooter with color-match synthesis: collect 3 same-color shards to trigger super abilities (screen wipe, freeze, heal, overdrive). Risk/reward shard positioning.

title: Alchemy Drop
idea: Falling-block puzzle: stack elemental blocks, match 3+ to clear, chain reactions cascade for score multipliers. Reinterpreted from alchemy synthesis idea.

title: Mining Front
idea: Lane-based tower defense: place mining turrets, chain adjacent reactors for amplified damage, manage ore economy across 10 waves. Reinterpreted from space-mining deckbuilder idea.

title: FORESIGHT
idea: Grid survival: spend future knowledge to attack. Your vision of upcoming enemy spawns is the resource you spend. Reinterpreted from dice/bag roguelite idea (cost = future hand, not HP).

title: CHROMA BREAK
idea: Color-match breakout: paddle cycles through 4 elements, ball only damages matching-color bricks, consecutive same-color breaks build COMBO for piercing SUPER BALL. Reinterpreted from alchemy synthesis idea (score 31.65).

title: Element Drop
idea: Pachinko/Peggle ball-drop with alchemy synthesis: consecutive same-element peg hits double the combo multiplier. Reinterpreted from alchemy synthesis idea (score 31.65).

title: Gravity Well
idea: Orbital survival: capture drifting mass into orbit, then trigger chain collapse for combo score. Manage heat from orbiting mass. Reinterpreted from alchemy dice/bag roguelite idea (score 32.2) with resonance echoes from movement trail.

title: CHAIN VAULT
idea: Color-chain platformer: jump between platforms, chain same-colored landings to trigger cascading SHATTER for massive score. Reinterpreted from hacking auto-shooter idea (score 31.55) with chain propagation + one-color constraint hooks.

title: ORE SERPENT
idea: Snake-like mining: navigate a growing drill-serpent, collect same-color ores consecutively for COMBO multiplier. Body constrains movement — longer = more risk. Reinterpreted from auto-shooter/space-mining idea (score 32.2) with log/replay as assets hook.

title: CHAIN REACTOR
idea: Top-down arena shooter: destroy one enemy to trigger cascading same-color chain reactions. Reinterpreted from deckbuilder idea (score 31.95) with chain propagation + one-color-per-action hooks.

title: ECHO DRIFT
idea: Grid-based top-down racer: leave colored echo trail on track, re-entering same-color cells triggers COMBO chain multipliers while building dangerous heat. DISCHARGE to clear. Reinterpreted from auto-shooter/power-plant idea (score 32.15) with log/replay → echo trail, CA grid → volatile spread hooks.

title: THRUST CHAIN
idea: Lunar lander with color-matched combo chains: land on same-color pads consecutively for COMBO multipliers while managing fuel, HP, and gravity. Reinterpreted from deckbuilder/logistics idea (score 32.15) with circuit/pipe flow → color chain, split/converge → combo jackpot hooks.

title: CALAMITY SIEGE
idea: Space-invaders style gallery shooter: contain enemies before they breach. Same-color combo unlocks piercing laser. Reinterpreted from calamity sealing deckbuilder idea (score 32.05).
